content.text:
**Recent Top X Posts on AI Investments and Funding from a16z, Sequoia, Accel (English language, as of Feb 5, 2026):**

a16z highlighted that AI investments made up a historically large share of VC capital in 2025, quoting Ben Horowitz: "If you have data and you have enough GPUs, you can solve almost any problem. It is magic."[[1]](https://x.com/i/status/2018443666243846351)[[2]](https://x.com/i/status/2018341624498069739)

**Major Recent Funding Rounds Mentioned:**

- **ElevenLabs** (AI voice agents): Raised $500M in Series D at $11B valuation (tripling in a year), led by Sequoia Capital (Andrew Reed joining board). a16z quadrupled down, ICONIQ tripled down; new investors include Lightspeed, Evantic, BOND. ARR exceeded $330M; funds for ElevenAgents platform expansion.[[3]](https://x.com/i/status/2019048392446579088)[[4]](https://x.com/i/status/2019113886738444798)[[5]](https://x.com/i/status/2019171320223670585)[[6]](https://x.com/i/status/2019052563417489783)

- **Day.ai** (AI-native CRM with context graphs for agents): Raised $20M led by Sequoia. Focuses on foundational AI for future agent-driven sales/tools, built from ground up (not retrofitting LLMs on traditional CRMs).[[7]](https://x.com/i/status/2018367302669070505)

- **a16z's Own Raise**: a16z raised $1.7B for AI infrastructure investments (e.g., compute, talent, search infra). Multiple posts linking TechCrunch coverage on where the funds are going.[[8]](https://x.com/i/status/2019145987252740409)[[9]](https://x.com/i/status/2019146473678479681)

**Smaller/Crypto-Related Rounds:**
- OpenGradient (decentralized AI compute?): $8.5M seed incl. a16z Crypto Startup Accelerator (CSX), Coinbase Ventures, Balaji, etc.[[10]](https://x.com/i/status/2017575001013297195)
- Kairos (prediction markets trading terminal): $2.5M led by a16z crypto, Geneva Trading.[[11]](https://x.com/i/status/2019190061133361423)
- Onvoyage.ai: $3M backed by a16z & Solana Ventures (testnet active, potential airdrop farming buzz).[[12]](https://x.com/i/status/2019186912876216602)[[13]](https://x.com/i/status/2019170206728503389)

Limited recent mentions of Accel AI-specific deals in top/latest results. Overall sentiment: Massive VC commitment to AI infra, voice/gen AI, and agent platforms amid 2025's boom continuing into 2026.[[14]](https://x.com/i/status/2018356374627905918)
